questions.question: If f(x) = 3x - 5 and g(x) = x² + 2, find f(g(2)).
A function h(x) = 2(x - 3)² + 4 is a transformation of the parent function y = x². Describe the transformations in order.
questions.answer: shift right 3 units, stretch vertically by factor of 2, shift up 4 units
questions.explanation: The term (x - 3) shifts the graph right 3 units; the coefficient 2 stretches vertically; the +4 shifts up 4 units.

questions.question: Given f(x) = (x + 1)/(x - 2), find the value of x for which f(x) is undefined.
questions.explanation: A rational function is undefined when its denominator equals zero. Setting x - 2 = 0 gives x = 2.

questions.question: If p(x) = 5x + 1 and q(x) = x - 3, what is (p ∘ q)(x)?
questions.explanation: Composition (p ∘ q)(x) means p(q(x)). Substitute q(x) into p: p(x - 3) = 5(x - 3) + 1 = 5x - 15 + 1 = 5x - 14.

questions.question: The function f(x) = √(x + 5) has domain restrictions. What is the domain?
questions.explanation: The expression under the square root must be non-negative: x + 5 ≥ 0, so x ≥ -5.

questions.question: A linear function passes through (2, 7) and (5, 16). Write the function as f(x) = mx + b.
